dimensions.name: Development Progress
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Evaluate how much of the complete Week 2 deliverable is implemented. Required: state definitions, tools, judge nodes, Chief Justice synthesis, graph wiring, infra, and reports. Check git history for narrative.

judicial_logic.prosecutor: Score 0 (Absent) if empty. Score 7 (Superficial) if bulk uploads or stubs. Score 21 (Partial) if detective pipeline runs but judicial layer is weak/linear. Score 35 (Complete) only if full end-to-end narrative exists.
judicial_logic.defense: Advocate for Complete (35) if the pipeline executes end-to-end and all required files are substantive. Highlight atomic commits.
judicial_logic.tech_lead: Verify Pydantic/TypedDict models, sandboxed tools, structured output in judges, and deterministic synthesis rules.

dimensions.levels: 35 pts: Complete System (Atomic commits, full pipeline, all files substantive, self-run report). 21 pts: Partial Pipeline (Core infra exists, detective runs, but judicial/synthesis is incomplete). 7 pts: Superficial (Bulk uploads, stubs, no graph wiring). 0 pts: Absent.

dimensions.name: Feedback Implementation
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Trace if the peer acted on feedback from communication, code reviews, or agent-generated reports. Check for commits addressing specific issues.

judicial_logic.prosecutor: Score 4 (Ignored) if feedback was provided but ignored. Score 12 (Selective) if surface-level fixes but deep structural issues remain.
judicial_logic.defense: Score 20 (Fully Integrated) if all substantive points addressed or deferred with rationale. Highlight MinMax loop engagement.
judicial_logic.tech_lead: Score 0 (No Exchange) only if NO feedback occurred. Do not penalize if no channel existed.

dimensions.levels: 20 pts: Fully Integrated (Traceable commits addressing all feedback or documented deferral). 12 pts: Selective (Some points addressed, surface-level fixes). 4 pts: Ignored (No changes following feedback). 0 pts: No Exchange (Exclude if no feedback given).

dimensions.name: Proactive Communication
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Assess initiative in coordination. Check for progress shares, blocker flags, and design discussions throughout the period.

judicial_logic.prosecutor: Score 4 (Reactive) if they only responded when prompted. Score 0 (Absent) if unreachable.
judicial_logic.defense: Score 20 (Collaborative Driver) if shared early/often, sought input on trade-offs. Score 12 (Engaged) if initiated a few times.
judicial_logic.tech_lead: Evaluate if communication enabled useful feedback cycles and bidirectional coordination.

dimensions.levels: 20 pts: Collaborative Driver (Proactive, shared work early/often, sought input). 12 pts: Engaged (Initiated contact a few times, responsive). 4 pts: Reactive Only (Responses only, minimal detail). 0 pts: Absent (No communication).

dimensions.name: Agent Feedback Relevance
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Evaluate YOUR auditor agent's output against the peer repo. Is it forensic-quality? Does it follow the spec? Is it grounded in real evidence?

judicial_logic.prosecutor: Score 5 (Generic Noise) if output is boilerplate or non-specific. Score 0 if it crashed or failed to run. Be honest.
judicial_logic.defense: Score 25 (Full Forensic Audit) if it follows full pipeline with synthesized verdict and remediation. Score 15 (Targeted) if grounded but shallow.
judicial_logic.tech_lead: Assess if evidence objects contain real paths/analysis vs. simple file existence checks.

dimensions.levels: 25 pts: Full Forensic Audit (Complete pipeline, synthesized verdict, remediation). 15 pts: Targeted Analysis (Grounded in real files but shallow). 5 pts: Generic Noise (Boilerplate/hallucinated, non-specific). 0 pts: No Output.

synthesis_rules.security_override: Confirmed security flaws (e.g., raw os.system) cap total forensic score at 40% of max.
synthesis_rules.fact_supremacy: Forensic evidence (facts) always overrules Judicial opinion (interpretation).
synthesis_rules.dissent_requirement: The Chief Justice must summarize why the Prosecutor and Defense disagreed in the final report.
